channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Mattress fly tippingz, 6th July
item.description:
Mattress has been left on road. Issue reported as fixed but the mattress is still there.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pinnell Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins lining the footpath, 6th July
item.description:
Bins are lining the footpath making it impossible to pass without encountering the stench of the rubbish. This is a recurring issue.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Holmdale Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple road repair machine parked and left in a dangerous place - causing mass obstructions, 6th July
item.description:
Multiple large road repair machines (JCB, rollers etc) have been parked and left at the end of Palm Avenue, adjacent to the junction to Maidstone Road. Parked on double yellow lines, blocking huge section of the road. The machinery being left in its current location is so dangerous - they are right at then junction and blocking a large stretch of the road! Cars have no choice but to queue / wait on the wrong side of the road when turning out of Palm Avenue onto Maidstone Road, which in-turn stops anyone being able to turn into Palm Avenue from Maidstone Road. It would have been much safer, more considerate to other drivers and pedestrians, had they parked some of the machinery elsewhere, rather than on the double yellow lines - which are surely there for a reason? Having the machinery left in its current location, is an accident waiting to happen.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palm Avenue, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking drive, 6th July
item.description:
Parked on double yellow with blips

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking fire access and garages, 6th July
item.description:
4 garages and emergency accessed blocked

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New driveway construction leaving a dangerous edge that cut my foot, 6th July
item.description:
Very sharp edge protruding into the pavement - I think possibly beyond their boundary - caused me an injury and it is only a matter of time before it does the same to someone else
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farnham Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned motorbike (still, after at least three years), 6th July
item.description:
This motorbike has been abandoned on Oriel Road for at least three years. I first reported it to you in July 2024. You replied that it does not classify as an AV because it has been clamped by the DVLA. But someone must remove this. Who? Please advise.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oriel Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa and load of card boxes causing huge obstruction on the pavement, 6th July
item.description:
The items have been left for more than few weeks. They are causing a huge obstraction for pedestrians as well as wheel chair users. 9Vicarage Park 11Vicarage Park Can these please be removed ASAP before someone gets hurt. Many thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vicarage Park, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping still there despite you saying you’ve fixed it, 6th July
item.description:
The fly tipping is still there and being added to, despite a notification saying it’s been fixed

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pembury Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree needs pruning, 6th July
item.description:
Tree outside my house 72 Maple Crescent is in urgent need of pruning. The tree is too big and may cause damage to my house if high winds occur. Thank you so much for your help.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Maple Crescent, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned wrecked car on Oriel Road, 6th July
item.description:
This car was abandoned on the evening of Friday 3 July 2026, between 5pm and 7.45pm. It is opposite our house at 77 Oriel Road. No owner has been seen and the police do not seem to be aware.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hassett Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The tree blocks the pavement, 6th July
item.description:
The tree needs pruning
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worsley Bridge Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping- garages back of Hillsboro Road, 6th July
item.description:
Flytip needs clearing, regular issue by these garages at the back of Hillsboro Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Hillsboro Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 6th July
item.description:
Side of 1 Nimegen Way by resident of 1 Nimegen Way SE22 8TL

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Nimegen Way, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bags and tree debris left on pavement, 6th July
item.description:
Cowboy gardeners did work (not for us) and dumped rubbish on pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): John Ruskin Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Ford Sierra silver colore, 6th July
item.description:
Registration: F956SPC Silver Ford Sierre Estate Abandoned since 3 weeks untouched. There is no tax on the vehicle.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Callender Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A series of trees with low hanging branches opposite 300-302 Baytree Centre SW9., 6th July
item.description:
I like to report a series of trees with very low hanging branches. The passing buses are colliding with the branches thus loosening them causing them to fall. Please can the branches be trimmed back so as to avoid any possible risk to the public.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 304, Brixton Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikes constantly left to fall into peoples cars by neighbours, 6th July
item.description:
These bikes are often left there by my neighbours at number 13 I’ve asked them to stop as they are a danger and fall on vehicles? IgnoredAlso, they have put their bins also on the pavement to cause a further obstruction This has been since moving in

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunsmure Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped furniture, 6th July
item.description:
Dumped furniture

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mildenhall Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain blocked, 6th July
item.description:
Causes major flooding on pavement! Urgent!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
